items.title: We trained models with reinforcement learning on realistic conversations to reinforce beneficial tra...
items.summary: We trained models with reinforcement learning on realistic conversations to reinforce beneficial traits like truthfulness, humility under uncertainty, openness to correction, fairness, and concern for human welfare, across 12 domains, including health, science, and education.💬12🔄…

items.title: As AI takes on longer, higher-stakes tasks, we want models to carry beneficial and safe behavior int...
items.summary: As AI takes on longer, higher-stakes tasks, we want models to carry beneficial and safe behavior into new domains beyond their training—and maintain it under pressure. That’s the idea behind our new research on training models to be broadly and persistently beneficial. alignment.…
